summary: Frontend-only iteration verifying PropertyCard Guesty-mirror, PropertiesPage 'Explore Map' CTA, and regression on PropertyDetailPage breakdown/coupon/Leaflet, CheckoutPage breakdown, and Admin page. ALL targeted features verified working end-to-end with 0 page errors. Backend testing skipped per request.

property_detail_page.invalid_coupon_toast_message: This coupon code is invalid or has expired.

console_observations.transient_failed_to_fetch_on_initial_mou: Observed on calendar/listing/quote first call — caused by the Emergent badge script wrapping window.fetch and draining the response body before client reads it. PropertyDetailPage already has defensive `await res.json().catch(()=>({}))` so user-visible flow is unaffected. quote-breakdown still renders €3,668.51 within 4-6s. Cosmetic console noise only.

critical_code_review_comments: PropertyCard.jsx ratingOutOfFive logic correctly normalises both /5 and /10 source data, then rounds to nearest 0.05 to match Guesty native display.

PropertyCard.jsx uses semantic <Link> wrapping the entire card; the 'Book now' element is a <span> inside the link — works because the link covers it. If accessibility on a separate book-now action is desired (e.g., a future quick-book modal), convert to a real <button> with event.stopPropagation.
PropertiesPage Explore Map CTA has data-testid='explore-map-btn' and routes to /map correctly.
CheckoutPage no longer renders any [data-testid*='addon'] — verified.
Toast 'This coupon code is invalid or has expired.' surfaces from backend INVALID_COUPON mapping — clean UX.
test_credentials: Admin key: cvpm-admin-2026 (verified working as default).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend mirror of Guesty native flow is feature-complete. PropertyCard exposes data-testid='property-card-{id}', 'rating-chip', 'card-description', 'book-now-card-btn'. PropertiesPage exposes 'explore-map-btn' navigating to /map. PropertyDetailPage 'book-now-btn' navigates to /checkout/{quoteId}?ratePlanId=... CheckoutPage testids: 'checkout-page', 'booking-summary', 'checkout-breakdown', 'checkout-total', plus guest-firstname/lastname/email/phone. The transient 'Failed to fetch' console errors on first render of PropertyDetailPage are caused by the Emergent badge script wrapping window.fetch (badge drains body before client reads). The UI re-fetches and renders correctly; safe to ignore unless reported as a customer-visible bug.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found this iteration
